title: Caution advised on Outeniqua Pass
description: GEORGE NEWS - A truck has collided with the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A truck has collided with the barrier wall on Outeniqua Pass while traveling towards George earlier this afternoon, Wednesday, 5 February.


> Emergency services are on the scene.


Motorists are advised to proceed with caution as the road is wet and visibility is low.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
